last_hatch.name: Cinder
last_hatch.flavor: The shell cracked once. Then went still. You leaned in — and a paw shot out and bopped you on the nose. Cinder tumbled free, looked around at the world, and immediately started batting at everything in reach. A playful cat. Already causing problems.

activity_log.event: Ember had the zoomies times ten. You were a little scared. Then she crashed again.
Ember launched into chaos mode three times in a row. Wild dragons burn bright and fast.
Ember was petted back to life and immediately went feral. Classic.
Ember was fed a big meal. Ate carefully, licked the bowl clean. Mood: content.
Pebble heard Cinder hatch and immediately retreated to the furthest corner of the room.
Pebble sensed the new hatchling and hid under a rock. Shy recognizes shy.
Pebble played hard, then crashed immediately after. Energy depleted.
Baby_EmbPeb immediately tried to wrestle Cinder. Cinder bopped them on the snout. They are now best enemies.
Baby_EmbPeb went absolutely feral during play. Something got knocked over.
Baby_EmbPeb was fed. Thoroughly stuffed.
Baby_CinWis arrived. Wisp peered at the tiny kit and let out a very small, very shy flame.
Played with Cinder until they both collapsed. Besties. Bond: 88.
Cinder chased Wisp through the whole forest. Wisp loved every second of it.
Cinder approached. Wisp froze — then cautiously sniffed back. Something stirred.
Baby_CinWis hatched. Cinder sniffed it once, decided it was hers, and sat on it protectively.
Played with Wisp until they both collapsed. Bond: 88. Besties.
Cinder chased Wisp for the fifth time today. Wisp keeps running. Cinder keeps following.
Cinder spotted Wisp. Made a decision. Has not wavered since.
Baby_CinWis was born — a shy cat, child of Cinder and Wisp. Looked around nervously. Hid immediately.
Cinder sat on Baby_CinWis. Wisp breathed a small protective flame. The family is complete.
